title: 卡尔的AI沃茨 on X: "Seedance 2.0又出10种神级玩法，打奥特曼已经落后N个版本了" / X

sections.title: Seedance 2.0 Overview and Basic Usage
key_points: Seedance 2.0 supports 4 input modalities: image, video, audio, text
Maximum 12 files can be uploaded for mixed input
Available on JiMeng platform with video generation mode
Works with Seedream 5.0 Lite (4K image model) for enhanced results

sections.title: Advanced Video Generation Techniques
key_points: Nine-panel storyboard generation for coherent video sequences
Action reference from uploaded videos (15-second limit, 720p recommended)
Character consistency across different scenes and styles
Smooth transitions between action sequences and camera movements

sections.title: Creative Applications and Use Cases
key_points: Logo and text animation generation (AE-quality results)
Novel text-to-video adaptation with automatic subtitles
Script table interpretation for complete video production
Travel photo to vlog-style video conversion with location recognition

sections.title: Platform Ethics and Real Person Usage
key_points: Initial controversy over real person replication capabilities
Platform implemented identity verification for personal content
Balance between creative freedom and privacy protection
Discussion on AI's ability to replicate public figures vs ordinary users

summary.title: Comprehensive Guide to Seedance 2.0: 10 Advanced Video Generation Techniques
takeaways: Seedance 2.0 offers unprecedented multimodal video generation with 4 input types and 12-file capacity
The platform can generate professional-quality content from storyboards, scripts, and reference materials
Real person replication requires identity verification, showing platform's effort to balance innovation with ethics
Quality approaches professional video editing software like After Effects for text animations and effects
actionable: Use 720p video references under 15 seconds for best action replication results
Combine Seedream 5.0 Lite with Seedance 2.0 for enhanced character consistency
Add 'no BGM' or 'no subtitles' in prompts to control automatic additions
Verify identity on platform to use personal images and videos legally
Create detailed storyboards or scripts for complex video production needs
